requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance (MEPS) for LED Lighting (SON energy-performance standard)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 照明的最低能效标准（MEPS）（SON 能效标准）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 照明的最低能效標準（MEPS）（SON 能效標準）

summary.en: Nigeria operates a minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy-labelling regime for appliances and lighting, developed by SON together with the Federal Ministry of Power and the Energy Commission of Nigeria as part of the national programme to phase out inefficient lighting. LED lamps and luminaires placed on the Nigerian market are expected to meet a minimum luminous efficacy (lm/W) and related performance criteria set in the applicable Nigerian Industrial Standard for lighting energy performance. Energy-performance evidence (efficacy, lumen output, power, and where specified colour rendering and rated life) supports the SONCAP Product Certificate, and the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate is required before clearance. The detailed lm/W thresholds and product scope must be verified against the current SON energy-performance standard and any Federal Ministry of Power / Energy Commission of Nigeria implementing instrument in force.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚针对家电及照明实行最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效标签制度，由 SON 会同联邦电力部及尼日利亚能源委员会作为国家淘汰低效照明计划的一部分制定。投放尼日利亚市场的 LED 灯及灯具应满足适用的尼日利亚照明能效工业标准所设的最低光效（lm/W）及相关性能指标。能效证据（光效、光通量、功率，以及在规定时的显色指数和额定寿命）支持 SONCAP 产品证书，清关前须取得每批货物 SONCAP 证书。详细的 lm/W 阈值及产品范围须对照现行 SON 能效标准及任何生效的联邦电力部／尼日利亚能源委员会实施文书核验。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞針對家電及照明實行最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效標籤制度，由 SON 會同聯邦電力部及奈及利亞能源委員會作為國家淘汰低效照明計劃的一部分制定。投放奈及利亞市場的 LED 燈及燈具應滿足適用的奈及利亞照明能效工業標準所設的最低光效（lm/W）及相關性能指標。能效證據（光效、光通量、功率，以及在規定時的顯色指數和額定壽命）支持 SONCAP 產品證書，清關前須取得每批貨物 SONCAP 證書。詳細的 lm/W 閾值及產品範圍須對照現行 SON 能效標準及任何生效的聯邦電力部／奈及利亞能源委員會實施文書核驗。

standards_or_laws: SON Nigerian Industrial Standard for lighting energy performance (MEPS — minimum luminous efficacy and performance criteria for LED lamps/luminaires; verify current edition and scope)
Federal Ministry of Power / Energy Commission of Nigeria — national appliance and lighting energy-efficiency programme
SONCAP — Product Certificate + per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (energy-performance evidence forms part of the PC package)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three grades: Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for market entry in China. China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. The China grades use absolute lm/W thresholds. Chinese CEL registration and GB 30255 grade evidence are not recognised under the Nigerian SONCAP / MEPS pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），定义三个等级：1 级 ≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。中国等级采用绝对 lm/W 阈值。中国 CEL 注册及 GB 30255 等级证据不被尼日利亚 SONCAP／MEPS 路径所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），定義三個等級：1 級 ≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。中國等級採用絕對 lm/W 閾值。中國 CEL 注冊及 GB 30255 等級證據不被奈及利亞 SONCAP／MEPS 路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — Grade 1/2/3 at 90/80/70 lm/W)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: Both Nigeria and China set a minimum efficacy for LED lighting, but they are separate schemes with no mutual recognition and the exact lm/W thresholds differ and must be checked against the current SON standard. A product meeting only China's Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) may fall below the Nigerian MEPS minimum depending on the SON threshold in force, so verify the specific lm/W requirement before relying on a CN grade. Procedurally: (1) China CEL registration does not satisfy Nigeria — energy-performance evidence must be packaged into the SONCAP Product Certificate; (2) testing must be to the SON-accepted method by a SON-recognised lab; (3) products are evaluated on 230 V / 50 Hz. Confirm the current SON lighting energy-performance standard edition, its lm/W minimum, and whether colour rendering and rated-life criteria are included, before assuming a CN Grade 2/3 product qualifies.
gap.zh: 尼日利亚与中国均为 LED 照明设定最低光效，但为各自独立、互不认可的方案，且确切 lm/W 阈值不同，须对照现行 SON 标准核验。仅满足中国 3 级（≥70 lm/W）的产品，视生效的 SON 阈值而定，可能低于尼日利亚 MEPS 最低要求，故在依赖中国等级前须核实具体 lm/W 要求。程序上：（1）中国 CEL 注册不满足尼日利亚——能效证据须纳入 SONCAP 产品证书；（2）检测须按 SON 接受方法、由 SON 认可实验室进行；（3）产品在 230 V / 50 Hz 上评估。在假定中国 2/3 级产品合格前，须确认现行 SON 照明能效标准版本、其 lm/W 最低值，以及是否包含显色指数和额定寿命指标。
gap.zht: 奈及利亞與中國均為 LED 照明設定最低光效，但為各自獨立、互不認可的方案，且確切 lm/W 閾值不同，須對照現行 SON 標準核驗。僅滿足中國 3 級（≥70 lm/W）的產品，視生效的 SON 閾值而定，可能低於奈及利亞 MEPS 最低要求，故在依賴中國等級前須核實具體 lm/W 要求。程序上：（1）中國 CEL 注冊不滿足奈及利亞——能效證據須納入 SONCAP 產品證書；（2）檢測須按 SON 接受方法、由 SON 認可實驗室進行；（3）產品在 230 V / 50 Hz 上評估。在假定中國 2/3 級產品合格前，須確認現行 SON 照明能效標準版本、其 lm/W 最低值，以及是否包含顯色指數和額定壽命指標。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (verify threshold) — LED lighting must meet the SON minimum energy performance standard; energy-performance evidence forms part of the SONCAP Product Certificate; per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required for clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nigeria sets minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for LED lighting through SON and the national energy-efficiency programme; energy-performance evidence supports the SONCAP Product Certificate. The scheme is separate from China's GB 30255 and the exact lm/W thresholds differ and must be verified against the current SON standard — a CN Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) product may not meet the Nigerian minimum. China CEL registration does not satisfy SONCAP: test to the SON-accepted method on a 230 V / 50 Hz basis and package the evidence into the SONCAP dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚通过 SON 及国家能效计划为 LED 照明设定最低能效标准（MEPS）；能效证据支持 SONCAP 产品证书。该方案与中国 GB 30255 各自独立，确切 lm/W 阈值不同，须对照现行 SON 标准核验——中国 3 级（≥70 lm/W）产品可能不满足尼日利亚最低要求。中国 CEL 注册不满足 SONCAP：须按 SON 接受方法在 230 V / 50 Hz 基础上检测，并将证据纳入 SONCAP 档案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奈及利亞透過 SON 及國家能效計劃為 LED 照明設定最低能效標準（MEPS）；能效證據支持 SONCAP 產品證書。該方案與中國 GB 30255 各自獨立，確切 lm/W 閾值不同，須對照現行 SON 標準核驗——中國 3 級（≥70 lm/W）產品可能不滿足奈及利亞最低要求。中國 CEL 注冊不滿足 SONCAP：須按 SON 接受方法在 230 V / 50 Hz 基礎上檢測，並將證據納入 SONCAP 檔案。

requirement_topic.en: Appliance Energy Label for LED Lighting (SON energy-labelling requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 照明的家电能效标签（SON 能效标签要求）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 照明的家電能效標籤（SON 能效標籤要求）

summary.en: Alongside MEPS, Nigeria operates an appliance energy-labelling scheme administered by SON under which regulated appliances and lighting carry an energy-efficiency label showing the product's performance (a star-rating or class plus key data such as luminous flux and power). For in-scope LED lighting, the energy label and underlying registration/verification must be in order before market placement, and the labelling consistency is checked as part of SON conformity. The label and product markings must match the certified model and be in English, with the importer of record identifiable. The exact label format, rating scale, and which lighting categories are in scope must be verified against the current SON energy-labelling regulation and the national energy-efficiency programme in force, as the scheme has been rolled out progressively across appliance categories.
summary.zh: 除 MEPS 外，尼日利亚实行由 SON 管理的家电能效标签方案，受管制的家电及照明须带有显示产品性能的能效标签（星级或等级，加上光通量、功率等关键数据）。对范围内的 LED 照明，能效标签及其背后的注册/核验须在投放市场前就绪，标签一致性作为 SON 合格评定的一部分接受检查。标签及产品标志须与认证型号一致并使用英文，登记进口商须可识别。确切的标签格式、评级标度及哪些照明类别在范围内，须对照现行 SON 能效标签法规及生效的国家能效计划核验，因该方案在各家电类别中逐步推行。
summary.zht: 除 MEPS 外，奈及利亞實行由 SON 管理的家電能效標籤方案，受管制的家電及照明須帶有顯示產品性能的能效標籤（星級或等級，加上光通量、功率等關鍵數據）。對範圍內的 LED 照明，能效標籤及其背後的注冊/核驗須在投放市場前就緒，標籤一致性作為 SON 合格評定的一部分接受檢查。標籤及產品標誌須與認證型號一致並使用英文，登記進口商須可識別。確切的標籤格式、評級標度及哪些照明類別在範圍內，須對照現行 SON 能效標籤法規及生效的國家能效計劃核驗，因該方案在各家電類別中逐步推行。

standards_or_laws: SON appliance energy-labelling regulation / Nigerian Industrial Standard for energy labelling (star-rating or class-based label; verify current format and in-scope lighting categories)
Federal Ministry of Power / Energy Commission of Nigeria — national appliance and lighting energy-efficiency labelling programme

summary.en: China's equivalent is the mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 for LED room luminaires, registered with CQC/CECP and administered by SAMR. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds and key parameters. The Chinese label is in Chinese and tailored to the CN scheme. There is no mutual recognition between the China Energy Label and the SON energy-labelling scheme; a product must be registered/labelled separately for each market.
summary.zh: 中国对应为依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品的强制性中国能效标识（CEL），向 CQC/CECP 注册并由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。CEL 依绝对 lm/W 阈值及关键参数显示 1–3 级。中国标签为中文且贴合中国方案。中国能效标识与 SON 能效标签方案之间无互认；产品须为各市场分别注册/贴标。
summary.zht: 中國對應為依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品的強制性中國能效標識（CEL），向 CQC/CECP 注冊並由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。CEL 依絕對 lm/W 閾值及關鍵參數顯示 1–3 級。中國標籤為中文且貼合中國方案。中國能效標識與 SON 能效標籤方案之間無互認；產品須為各市場分別注冊/貼標。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both countries require an energy label, but the schemes are non-mutual and use different formats: China's CEL shows Grade 1–3 on absolute lm/W thresholds in Chinese, while Nigeria's SON label uses its own rating scale in English and is checked for consistency within SON conformity. A CN-spec product carrying a China Energy Label is not compliant for Nigeria — the label must be re-worked to the SON format, in English, with the importer of record and 230 V ratings, and matching the certified model. Practical steps: (1) confirm whether the specific LED product category is currently in scope of the SON energy-labelling regulation; (2) produce the SON-format label and ensure registration/verification as required; (3) ensure label and markings match the SONCAP-certified model to avoid per-shipment SONCAP Certificate refusal. Verify the current SON label format and scope, as the scheme has expanded progressively.
gap.zh: 两国均要求能效标签，但方案互不认可且格式不同：中国 CEL 以绝对 lm/W 阈值用中文显示 1–3 级，而尼日利亚 SON 标签使用其自有评级标度并以英文标注，在 SON 合格评定内检查一致性。带中国能效标识的中国规格产品在尼日利亚不合规——标签须改为 SON 格式、用英文、带登记进口商及 230 V 定额，并与认证型号一致。实务步骤：（1）确认具体 LED 产品类别当前是否在 SON 能效标签法规范围内；（2）制作 SON 格式标签并按要求完成注册/核验；（3）确保标签及标志与 SONCAP 认证型号一致，以免每批 SONCAP 证书被拒。须核验现行 SON 标签格式及范围，因该方案逐步扩展。
gap.zht: 兩國均要求能效標籤，但方案互不認可且格式不同：中國 CEL 以絕對 lm/W 閾值用中文顯示 1–3 級，而奈及利亞 SON 標籤使用其自有評級標度並以英文標註，在 SON 合格評定內檢查一致性。帶中國能效標識的中國規格產品在奈及利亞不合規——標籤須改為 SON 格式、用英文、帶登記進口商及 230 V 定額，並與認證型號一致。實務步驟：（1）確認具體 LED 產品類別當前是否在 SON 能效標籤法規範圍內；（2）製作 SON 格式標籤並按要求完成注冊/核驗；（3）確保標籤及標誌與 SONCAP 認證型號一致，以免每批 SONCAP 證書被拒。須核驗現行 SON 標籤格式及範圍，因該方案逐步擴展。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (in-scope categories) — SON appliance energy label required for regulated LED lighting before market placement; label/markings must match the certified model; verify current scope and format
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required for LED room luminaires under GB 30255-2019

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nigeria's SON-administered appliance energy label applies to in-scope LED lighting and must be in order before market placement, in English, matching the SONCAP-certified model with importer-of-record and 230 V details. It is a separate, non-mutual scheme from China's GB 30255 China Energy Label, with a different rating format — a China Energy Label does not satisfy Nigeria. Confirm the current SON label format and whether the specific LED category is in scope, produce the SON-format label, and keep label/markings consistent with the certified model to avoid per-shipment SONCAP Certificate refusal.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚由 SON 管理的家电能效标签适用于范围内的 LED 照明，须在投放市场前就绪、使用英文、与 SONCAP 认证型号一致并含登记进口商及 230 V 信息。它与中国 GB 30255 中国能效标识为各自独立、互不认可的方案，评级格式不同——中国能效标识不满足尼日利亚。须确认现行 SON 标签格式及具体 LED 类别是否在范围内，制作 SON 格式标签，并使标签/标志与认证型号一致，以免每批 SONCAP 证书被拒。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奈及利亞由 SON 管理的家電能效標籤適用於範圍內的 LED 照明，須在投放市場前就緒、使用英文、與 SONCAP 認證型號一致並含登記進口商及 230 V 信息。它與中國 GB 30255 中國能效標識為各自獨立、互不認可的方案，評級格式不同——中國能效標識不滿足奈及利亞。須確認現行 SON 標籤格式及具體 LED 類別是否在範圍內，製作 SON 格式標籤，並使標籤/標誌與認證型號一致，以免每批 SONCAP 證書被拒。
